OF BERTRAND, FOX & ELLIOT MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF ALBERT WILLIAM ESPERSON CO.,INC., KENNETH ESPERSON, UNDER SUBMISSION UNTIL MAY 27, 2005 ON MAY-19-2005 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PART OF THE HEARING ON THE MOTION WAS HEARD IN OPEN COURT. AFTER ARGUMENT WAS MADE IN OPEN COURT, IT WAS DETERMINED BY THE COURT THAT AN IN CAMERA HEARING BE HELD IN CHAMBERS WITH COUNSEL OF RECORD AND POTENTIAL COUNSEL TO BE ONLY. THE COURT ORDERED THE RECORD SEALED. AFTER THE IN CAMERA HEARING THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING RULING IN OPEN COURT FOR ALL PARTIES. IF POTENTIAL NEW COUNSEL TO BE ACCEPTS THE ROLE AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD BY MAY 27, 2005 FOR PLAINTIFF THE COURT WILL NOT GRANT THE MOTION FOR WITHDRAWEL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR THE MOTION WILL BE MOOT SINCE A NEW ATTORNEY WILL BE REPRESENTING THE PLAINTIFF. IF THE POTENTIAL NEW COUNSEL DOES NOT ACCEPT THAN THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION WILL CONTINUE THE DISCOVERY CUTOFF OF JUNE 17, 2005 AND HEARING ON SUMMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION ON JUNE 16, 2005 TO THE WEEK OF JULY 18, 2005. THE MOVING PARTY WILL PREPARE AN ORDER REFLECTING COMMUNICATIONS THAT WERE MADE IN CHAMBERS AND IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647(302/REQ//JU)
